examples: Crystalline material is produced by mixing scintillation crystal into cerium vanadates crystal.
Thermal Decomposition reaction kinetics of cerium carbonate was investigated with Netzsch thermal analyzer.
The catalytic converter on your exhaust system contains cerium and lanthanum.

Nickel-metal-hydride batteries use neodymium, cerium, lanthanum and praseodymium, none of which are used in more efficient lithium-ion batteries.
